entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 and continuing to provide spot and derivatives trading through the active WEEX platform.
entity.notes: Official materials support the 2018 founding year and current global operation. Public material does not fully resolve the operating legal-entity and domicile structure, so the existing Singapore origin is retained with medium confidence. A reviewed regional matter is deferred for separate event promotion.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the WEEX brand.

events.title: WEEX was founded in 2018
events.description: WEEX was founded in 2018 as a centralized cryptocurrency trading platform.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the year but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: About WEEX
evidence.notes: The official company roadmap identifies 2018 as the founding year.

evidence.title: WEEX exchange overview
evidence.notes: Official educational material corroborates the 2018 founding year and centralized-exchange identity.

evidence.title: WEEX official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current identity and active trading interface.
